name: BEN_ELIG_PERSON_DETAILS_V
query: SELECT fact.elig_per_id elig_per_id, opt.elig_per_opt_id elig_per_opt_id, fact.per_in_ler_id per_in_ler_id, fact.person_id person_id, fact.pgm_id pgm_id, nvl(nvl(ptip.pl_typ_id,pl_typ2.pl_typ_id),pl_typ3.pl_typ_id) pl_typ_id, fact.pl_id pl_id, opt.opt_id opt_id, fact.ler_id ler_id, fact.ptip_id ptip_id, fact.plip_id plip_id , fact.DPNT_OTHR_PL_CVRD_RL_FLAG DPNT_OTHR_PL_CVRD_RL_FLAG, fact.PRTN_OVRIDN_THRU_DT PRTN_OVRIDN_THRU_DT, fact.PL_KEY_EE_FLAG PL_KEY_EE_FLAG, fact.ELIG_FLAG ELIG_FLAG , fact.COMP_REF_AMT COMP_REF_AMT, fact.AGE_VAL AGE_VAL, fact.LOS_VAL LOS_VAL, fact.PRTN_END_DT PRTN_END_DT, fact.PRTN_STRT_DT PRTN_STRT_DT, fact.WV_CTFN_TYP_CD WV_CTFN_TYP_CD, fact.HRS_WKD_VAL HRS_WKD_VAL, fact.NO_MX_PRTN_OVRID_THRU_FLAG NO_MX_PRTN_OVRID_THRU_FLAG, fact.PRTN_OVRIDN_RSN_CD PRTN_OVRIDN_RSN_CD, fact.PCT_FL_TM_VAL PCT_FL_TM_VAL, fact.FRZ_AGE_FLAG FRZ_AGE_FLAG, rel.REL_PRMRY_ASG_ID REL_PRMRY_ASG_ID, rel.BENEFIT_RELATION_NAME BENEFIT_RELATION_NAME, rel.BENEFIT_RELATION_ID BENEFIT_RELATION_ID, rel.PRIMARY_REL PRIMARY_REL, rel.LEGAL_ENTITY_ID LEGAL_ENTITY_ID, grp.BENEFIT_GROUP_ID BENEFIT_GROUP_ID, fact.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE elig_EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, fact.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE elig_EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, opt.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE opt_EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, opt.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE opt_EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, ptip.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE ptip_EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, ptip.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE ptip_EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, plip.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE plip_EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, plip.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE plip_EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, pl_typ.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE pl_typ_EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, pl_typ.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE pl_typ_EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, pl_typ2.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE pl_typ2_EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, pl_typ2.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE pl_typ2_EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, pl_typ3.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE pl_typ3_EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, pl_typ3.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE pl_typ3_EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, pl.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE pl_EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, pl.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE pl_EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, pl2.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE pl2_EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, pl2.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE pl2_EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, rel.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE rel_EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, rel.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE rel_EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, grp.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE grp_EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, grp.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE grp_EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, fact.last_updated_by elig_last_updated_by, fact.created_by elig_created_by, fact.creation_date elig_creation_date, fact.last_update_date elig_last_update_date, fact.last_update_login elig_last_update_login, opt.last_updated_by opt_last_updated_by, opt.created_by opt_created_by, opt.creation_date opt_creation_date, opt.last_update_date opt_last_update_date, opt.last_update_login opt_last_update_login FROM ben_elig_per_f fact, ben_elig_per_opt_f opt, ben_ptip_f ptip, ben_plip_f plip, ben_pl_typ_f pl_typ, ben_pl_typ_f pl_typ2, ben_pl_typ_f pl_typ3, ben_pl_f pl, ben_pl_f pl2, ben_benefit_relations_f rel, BEN_PER_BENEFIT_GROUP_F grp WHERE fact.elig_per_id = opt.elig_per_id(+) AND fact.ptip_id = ptip.ptip_id(+) AND ptip.pl_typ_id = pl_typ.pl_typ_id(+) AND fact.pl_id = pl.pl_id(+) AND pl.pl_typ_id = pl_typ2.pl_typ_id (+) AND fact.plip_id = plip.plip_id (+) AND plip.pl_id = pl2.pl_id (+) AND pl2.pl_typ_id = pl_typ3.pl_typ_id (+) and fact.per_in_ler_id = opt.per_in_ler_id (+) and fact.benefit_relation_id = rel.benefit_relation_id and fact.PERSON_ID = grp.PERSON_ID(+) and fact.pl_id is not null
